execution: vitest run for legacy/compat grouping logic (TC-18, TC-19)
vite build for production bundle validation
grep for hardcoded colors in compact components (TC-16, TC-17)
code review of Settings UI + store + reactivity chain for TC-20/21/22

cases.name: 主题 - light 模式
cases.evidence: grep '#[0-9a-fA-F]|rgb(|hsl(' across all 3 compact components: 0 hardcoded hex/hsl/rgb matches (excluding rgba(255,255,255,0.3) sweep overlay). grep -c 'var(--' counts: AgentRunBlock=1, MergeBlock=17, StandaloneToolCard=19. Total 37 CSS var references. All colors resolve through var(--accent), var(--border), var(--bg), var(--surface), var(--fg), var(--muted), var(--muted-dim), var(--success), var(--danger), var(--font-mono), var(--accent-light). Only non-var: rgba(255,255,255,0.3) in AgentRunBlock sweep gradient — translucent white overlay on var(--accent) base, valid in both themes. color-mix(in oklch, ...) used for chip/badge backgrounds, references CSS vars exclusively.

cases.name: 主题 - dark 模式
cases.evidence: Same evidence as TC-16. All 37 CSS var references adapt through [data-theme] selectors in style.css. settings.ts applyTheme sets data-theme attribute on documentElement → CSS var cascade. No component-level color overrides. rgba(255,255,255,0.3) sweep works identically on dark accent backgrounds. color-mix() with oklch is theme-agnostic.

cases.name: 旧消息兼容 - 无 contentBlocks
cases.evidence: vitest run message-layout.test.ts: TC-18 — 2 tests passed (1ms + 0ms). Test 1: legacy message with thinking+toolCalls+content but no contentBlocks → groupIntoSections(msg, undefined) falls to line 76: return groupByLegacyFields(msg) → returns ['thinking','toolCall','text']. Test 2: legacy message with only content → returns ['text']. Code path confirmed: message-layout.ts line 70-76, msg.contentBlocks?.length is falsy → groupByLegacyFields branch.

cases.name: compactStreaming=false 不受影响
cases.evidence: vitest: TC-19 — 2 tests passed (1ms + 0ms). Test 1: standaloneTools=undefined → groupByContentBlocksLegacy merges adjacent same-type: [thk,thk,tc-read] → ['thinking','toolCall']. Test 2: empty Set → all built-in tools merge into MergeBlock. Code review: AssistantContent.vue line 93: useCompact = computed(() => settingsStore.compactStreaming). When false, template skips v-if='useCompact' branch (line 8), uses v-else-if='sections.length' normal section rendering (lines 15-50). AgentRunBlock never instantiated. message-layout.ts line 72-74: standaloneTools undefined → groupByContentBlocksLegacy path (no standalone splitting).

cases.name: Settings - standaloneTools checkbox 默认值
cases.evidence: vitest: ALL_PI_TOOLS constant test — exactly 7 tools ['read','bash','edit','write','grep','find','ls'] confirmed. SystemPane.vue line 133: <template v-if='settingsStore.compactStreaming'> wraps standalone section. Line 141: <label v-for='tool in ALL_PI_TOOLS'> renders 7 checkboxes. Line 142-144: <Toggle :checked='settingsStore.standaloneTools.includes(tool)'>. settings.ts line 19: standaloneTools = ref<string[]>(['write', 'edit']). Result: 7 checkboxes, write+edit checked by default, visible only when compactStreaming enabled.

cases.name: Settings - 修改立即生效
cases.evidence: Reactivity chain verified: (1) SystemPane.vue line 70-78: toggleStandaloneTool mutates settingsStore.standaloneTools (reactive ref). (2) AgentRunBlock.vue computed: standaloneToolsSet = computed(() => new Set(settingsStore.standaloneTools)) — re-evaluates on store change. (3) rawSections = computed(() => groupIntoSections(msg, standaloneToolsSet.value)) — re-groups. (4) sections computed re-derives. TC-15 vitest already proved grouping changes with standaloneTools: adding 'bash' moves it from MergeBlock to StandaloneBlock. Vue reactivity propagates to template immediately, no reload needed.

cases.name: Settings - 持久化
cases.evidence: settings.ts line 60: persist config { key: 'xyz-settings', pick: ['theme', 'themePreset', 'locale', 'defaultModel', 'autoExpandThinking', 'autoExpandToolCalls', 'compactStreaming', 'standaloneTools'] }. 'standaloneTools' explicitly in pick array. Pinia persist plugin serializes to localStorage on mutation, deserializes on store init. Restart → store init → localStorage read → standaloneTools restored. compactStreaming also persisted in same pick array.

vitest_all.evidence: Test Files: 1 passed (1), Tests: 10 passed (10), Duration: 162ms. Includes TC-12 to TC-15 (core grouping), TC-18 (2 legacy tests), TC-19 (2 compactStreaming=false tests), ALL_PI_TOOLS (1 constant test).

notes: Non-core scope: TC-16 to TC-22 (AC-6 theme, AC-7 backward compat, AC-8 Settings).

TC-16/17 (theme): exhaustive grep confirmed 0 hardcoded hex/hsl/rgb colors across all 3 compact components. 37 CSS var references total. Only rgba(255,255,255,0.3) in sweep gradient is translucent overlay, not theme-dependent.
TC-18/19 (compat): vitest verified 4 tests (2 legacy + 2 compactStreaming=false) + code review of branching in message-layout.ts and conditional rendering in AssistantContent.vue.

TC-20/21/22 (Settings): code review confirmed 7-tool checkbox list, write+edit default, Pinia persist with standaloneTools in pick array, full reactivity chain from toggle → store → computed → template.
All 3 build gates pass: vue-tsc=0 errors, vite build=success in 2.23s, vitest=10/10 pass in 162ms.
